summary: Sets the purpose: ensure effective rest break management via C3 so staff do not work more than six hours without a break.
Defines windows and durations by shift length (8h, 10h, 12h) and notes rules around approved windows and codes.
source: Rest Break SOP ToC-Feb 26-v1.0.docx#Rest Break Windows

summary: Describes protection rules before, during, and after windows; prioritises ILT and major incidents; clarifies allocation to calls and station return.
